financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing really well because it keeps making more money each year.
It has little debt and plenty of cash, which helps it grow and invest in new opportunities.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is doing a good job managing risks, but climate change and rising costs are still big challenges.
They are working hard to protect against cyber threats, but the risk is always changing and needs constant attention.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing a great job taking care of the environment and its impact on it.
It also has strong leadership and fair practices, which boosts its overall score.

capital_structure.title: Capital Structure
capital_structure.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company has very little debt, which means it can handle its finances easily and safely.
It has plenty of cash on hand, so it can pay its bills and still invest in growth.

management_discussion.title: Management Discussion
management_discussion.label: Excellent
bullets: The company clearly explains its current performance and future plans, making it easy to understand their goals.
They are improving their operations and using technology to work more efficiently, which is a positive sign for future growth.

strategy.title: Strategy Overview
strategy.label: Excellent
bullets: The company has a clear plan that balances making money with caring for the environment and society.
They are good at following their plans but need to watch out for challenges from new technology and changing customer tastes.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well because it focuses on being environmentally friendly and using technology to grow.
ITC is strong financially and has a variety of products, which helps it handle challenges and keep growing.
